subcodes.first_line: O prisoner in the path of Truth! Prison hath ever been the dwelling-place of the faithful and the shelter of His loved ones. Therefore the chains of imprisonment are even as those of Joseph [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مسجون راه حق سجن همیشه مسکن یاران بوده و مامن دوستان لهذا زنجیر سجن یوسفی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
